Chris Chope

On the 4th of July I was honoured to be elected as the MP for Christchurch for the 8th time. I shall continue to look after the interests of my constituents irrespective of their political allegiance to the best of my ability, and in so doing hold the new Government to account.

This is where you can find out about my record in Parliament and locally. You can also learn about my political views and plans for the future. Please feel free to contact me on any matter. 

Want to stay up to date?

In which of these ways can you help us?
By agreeing to volunteer for us, you also agree to us contacting you about volunteering. For more information, please see our Data Protection and Privacy Policy

The information you provide is used in accordance with our Data Protection and Privacy Policy. By clicking this button you agree to your information being used in accordance with that policy.

Christchurch Conservatives

Christchurch has an active and thriving Conservative Association. Through this group you can get involved in social events, fundraising and helping local Conservatives get elected. You can find out more on their website:

Christchurch Conservatives

To Contact Me

All-Party Parliamentary Group on Park Homes

To bring together parliamentarians, park homeowners and industry representatives to discuss issues of common interest including legislation and its enforcement to eliminate abuse and disadvantage.

Chair & Registered Contact: Sir Christopher Chope MP, House of Commons
